引用该页面的菜单标题: Reference to the menu title of the page
页面已被引用,无法删除: This page has been referenced and cannot be deleted
输入支持文件格式的后缀后回车.如.png↵: Enter supported file format suffix and press Enter. e.g. .png↵
引用该页面的视图动作: View action that references the page
当以上类型无法满足时，选择[自定义]设置上传文件类型: When the above types cannot meet the needs, select [Custom] to set upload file type
确定删除布局容器和其中的容器及组件: Confirm the deletion of the layout container and its containers and components
动作区：拖拽「动作」组件在这里配置动作: Action area:Drag and drop the Action component here to configure the action
页面发布失败，以下特殊标记组件的属性校验失败，请打开属性查看原因并重新设置: The page fails to be published, and the attribute verification of the following special marker components fails. Please open the attribute to view the cause and reset the Settings
应用支持的客户端类型列表: List of client types supported by the application
首次进入组件设计或组件中的元件变更时需要生成SDK: SDK needs to be generated when entering component design or component changes for the first time
找不到对应的设计组件: Unable to find corresponding design component
未构成完整关联关系: The complete association relationship is not formed
由系统生成，禁止删除: Generated by the system, deletion prohibited
包含子菜单项，不允许直接删除: Including submenu items, direct deletion is not allowed
同级的前一个菜单名称: The name of the previous menu at the same level
将去掉表达式中的决定运算优先级的括号: Remove the parentheses in the expression that determine the priority of the operation
展示在组件库的名称: Name displayed in the component library
确定删除分组和其中的组件: Confirm the deletion of the group and its components
是否返回已安装基础应用: Whether to return installed basic applications
已构成完整关联关系: A complete association relationship has been formed
请输入操作列宽度，单位px: Please enter operation column width in px
界面设计器 - 界面设计器页面编辑: UI Designer - UI Designer Page Editing
内置的数据和存在被引用的数据不能删除: Built-in data and existing referenced data cannot be deleted
默认不支持排序: Sorting is not supported by default
引用该页面的菜单排序: Reference to the menu sorting of this page
确认要恢复吗?: Are you sure you want to resume?
正数正向偏移，负数反向偏移: Positive number for forward offset, negative for backward offset
当字段未设置【允许用户排序】属性时，默认不支持排序: When the Allow Sort attribute is not set for a field, sorting is not supported by default
列表搜索区: 拖拽「字段」相关组件在这里配置可搜索字段: List Search area: Drag and drop Fields where related components configure searchable fields
不能大于1024最大值: Cannot be greater than 1024 maximum value
每次生成SDK后需要下载模版工程，在其中进行开发: After each SDK generation, it is necessary to download the template project for development
具有子菜单项的菜单项不允许绑定页面: Menu items with submenu items are not allowed to bind to pages
当前属性面板属性复制到选中的属性面板中，将覆盖原属性设置: Copying the current property panel attributes to the selected property panel will overwrite the original property settings
具有子菜单项的菜单项不允许绑定新页面: Menu items with submenu items are not allowed to bind to new pages
若选择的方向页面位置不足，提示位置将自适应: If there is insufficient space in the selected direction, the prompt position will be adaptive
请输入展示小数位数: Please enter decimal places to display
移动端暂不支持配置树表: The mobile terminal does not support tree table configuration
字段和动作的唯一键.Field.field/Action.name: Unique keys for fields and actions Field.field/Action.name
由系统生成，禁止绑定当前页面: Generated by the system, prohibiting binding to the current page
在当前区域找不到所需组件，禁止拖放: Unable to find the required component in the current area, drag and drop prohibited
表格最右侧操作列默认展示操作的数量，超过个数的操作将被折叠收起: Default number of operations displayed in the rightmost operation column of the table; operations exceeding this number will be collapsed
操作列显示数据: The action column displays the data
当指定加载函数时,将不再自动识别加载函数: When a load function is specified, automatic recognition of load functions will be disabled
若计算值涉及变量，会随着变量变更同步变化。同时设置了默认值和计算公式时，默认值会: If the calculated value involves variables, it will change synchronously with variables. If both default value and calculation formula are set, the default value will be filled first, and subsequent field values will change according to the calculation function.
最后一个选项卡不允许删除: The last tab is not allowed to be deleted
组件已被引用,无法删除: The component has been referenced and cannot be deleted
动态组件在表单中为输入态，静态组件在表单中为只读态: Dynamic components are in input state in the form, and static components are in read-only state
该元素不可拖拽进此区域: This element cannot be dragged into this area
字段变更时清除数据: Clear data when field changes occur
可隐藏母版专注于页面主要内容的设计哦~: The hidden master focuses on the design of the main content of the page
activeRecord._isDialog ? '关闭弹窗' : active: activeRecord._isDialog ? 'Close the pop-up window' : activeRecord._isDrawer ? 'Close the drawer' : 'Return to the previous page'
不存储，仅用于提示: Do not store, used for hint only
请输入保留小数位数: Please enter decimal places to keep
页面分组可以被多个应用公用，修改分组名称将影响所有使用该分组的应用，请确认是否修: The page grouping can be shared by multiple applications. Modifying the grouping name will affect all applications using the grouping. Are you sure you want to modify it?
根据实际需求上传组件对应的JS文件: Upload JS files corresponding to components based on actual needs
由系统生成，禁止绑定已有页面: Generated by the system, prohibiting binding to existing pages
将去掉条件中的括号和未选中行: Remove parentheses and unselected rows from the condition
是否编译母版: Whether to compile the master version
由系统生成，禁止设置显示设备: Generated by the system, prohibiting the setting of display devices
右上角?点击展开的提示文字: Upper right corner? Click on the expanded prompt text
可将不同字段业务类型、单/多值组件汇集在一个组件中使用。如组件“下拉选”中包含下: Different field business types and single/multi value components can be combined into one component for use. If the component 'dropdown selection' includes two components: dropdown single selection and dropdown multiple selection
多值字段表示该字段可以存储或传输多个该业务类型的数据，非多值字段只能存储或传输单: Multi-value field means this field can store or transfer multiple data of this business type, non-multi-value field can only store or transfer single data of this business type
内置的数据仅支持查看页面详情: Built-in data only supports look up View Infomation
展开操作展示字段定义: Expand the action to show the field definition
请注意！若传输字段未进行搜索逻辑设置，搜索运行时将会异常报错。: Please note! If the transfer field is not configured with search logic, an error will occur during search runtime.
编辑支持视图类型可能导致属性面板的新增或删除: Editing a supported view type may result in the addition or deletion of the properties panel
表格区: 拖拽「字段」相关组件在这里配置表格字段: Table area: Drag and drop Fields related components here to configure table fields
由系统生成，禁止更换图标: Generated by the system, prohibiting icon replacement
请输入行高，单位px: Please enter row height in px
应用于枚举类组件,根据枚举项构造列表返回: Apply to enumeration class components, construct a list based on enumeration items, and return
由高级模式切换为快捷模式: Switch from advanced mode to shortcut mode
单值长度最大只能是20: The maximum length of a single value can only be 20
不允许拖入其他视图: Do not allow dragging into other views
确定删除选项页和其中的组件: Confirm the deletion of the options page and its components
删除菜单后，菜单将不在应用中展示，菜单绑定的页面不会被删除，请确认操作？: After deleting the menu, the menu will not be displayed in the application, and the page bound to the menu will not be deleted. Please confirm the operation.
表单区：拖拽「字段」相关组件在这里配置表单: Form area: Drag and drop  field related components to configure the form here
表单区：拖拽「字段」「分组」相关组件在这里配置表单: Form area: Drag and drop  Field Group related components here to configure the form
根据实际需求上传组件对应的CSS文件: Upload CSS files corresponding to components based on actual needs
自定义组件支持拖拽排序，接在系统组件后，可在预览中查看: Custom components support drag and drop sorting, and can be viewed in the preview after being connected to the system component
确定删除容器和其中的组件: Confirm the deletion of the container and its components
功能内测中，敬请期待: In beta testing, please stay tuned
确定删除选项卡和其中的选项页及组件: Confirm the deletion of the tab and its option pages and components
前端真正需要的前缀: The prefix that the front-end really needs
选中容器后可以增加行列，修改容器宽度。: After selecting the container, you can add rows/columns and modify container width.
请在左侧画布中选择组件: Please select a component in the left canvas
引用该页面的页面标题: The page title that refers to this page
前端真正需要的后缀: The suffix that the front-end really needs
排列方向,单选框多选框使用: Arrange direction, use single box and multiple boxes
设置的字段可以在当前视图中被使用(如表达式): Configured fields can be used in the current view (e.g., expressions)
由系统生成，禁止绑定新页面: Generated by the system, prohibiting binding to new pages
拖拽组件到容器中: Drag and drop components into the container
使用名称或显示名称搜索模型字段: Search model fields using name or display name
保留动作，在画布中删除动作后，会显示在左侧模型动作中，可继续在画布中使用: Retain action: after deleting the action in the canvas, it will be displayed in the left model actions and can still be used in the canvas
根据关联关系,分页查询记录列表和总数: Query the record list and total number in pages according to the association relationship
若无法展示请考虑网页是否允许被嵌入: If it cannot be displayed, please consider whether the webpage allows embedding
卡片动作区默认展示操作的数量，超过个数的操作将被折叠收起: Default number of operations displayed in card action area; operations exceeding this number will be collapsed
即表格中关联关系字段更新时数据的提交方式。全量提交指提交全部数据；差量提交指仅提: Data submission method when relationship fields in table are updated. Full submission means submitting all data; differential submission means submitting only updated data.
只能选择'启用'状态的Api资源: Only 'Enabled' API resources can be selected
启用后将展开全部折叠面板项。当启用手风琴模式后，该功能失效。: When enabled, all collapse panel items will be expanded. This function is invalid when accordion mode is enabled.
在实际页面中选择某一选项值时，将执行该函数加载数据。: When an option value is selected in the actual page, this function will be executed to load data.
在实际页面展示中，会按照配置的查询条件展示数据。: In actual page display, data will be displayed according to the configured query conditions.
在输入框中输入内容时，若所输入内容包含在搜索字段中，则这些包含内容的值将被作为搜: When entering content in the input box, if the entered content is included in the search fields, the values containing the content will be displayed as search results. By default, all option fields are set as search fields, and existing search conditions can be used as needed.
字段编码仅支持使用数字、字母、下划线，且以字母开头: Field code only supports numbers, letters, underscores, and must start with a letter
宽高占位提示为图片真实像素，若设置超过卡片大小会等比缩放: Width and height placeholder hints are real image pixels. If set larger than card size, it will be scaled proportionally
当前视图id不存在会自动隐藏: Will be hidden automatically if current view id does not exist
当字段未设置【允许用户排序】属性时，默认支持排序: When the field does not set [Allow User Sort] attribute, sorting is supported by default
支持jpg、jpeg、png、gif、webp、tiff、bmp: Supports jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp, tiff, bmp
支持mp4、avi、mov、wmv、mkv、flv、f4v、swf、rmvb、m: Supports mp4, avi, mov, wmv, mkv, flv, f4v, swf, rmvb, mpg
支持txt、pdf、doc、docx、xls、xlsx、cvs、xml、ppt、: Supports txt, pdf, doc, docx, xls, xlsx, cvs, xml, ppt, pptx, wps, htm, html, rtf, hlp
支持wav、flac、ape、alac、wavpack、mp3、aac、ogg: Supports wav, flac, ape, alac, wavpack, mp3, aac, ogg vorbis, opus, au, mmf, aif
支持树展开到哪一层节点: Support tree expansion to which level of nodes
点击展开文字动作区后,将动作拖入区域内: Click to expand text action area, then drag actions into the area
结束默认值大于开始默认值: End default value is greater than start default value
若启用此功能，则在选择任意层级时均可作为结束点，即当选定某一项后，若该项下存在子: If enabled, any selected level can be an end point. When an item is selected, all its sub-options will be selected. If disabled, only the leaf sub-options can be selected. This function is only valid when the field business type is many-to-one.
设置所有字段支持行内编辑，默认按字段设置: Set all fields to support inline edit, default by field
请输入最小列宽，单位px: Please enter min column width in px
请输入表格高度(默认300)，单位px: Please enter table height (default 300) in px
默认: 点击遮罩后不关闭: Default: Do Not Close on Mask Click
默认: 点击遮罩后自动关闭: Default: Auto Close on Mask Click
默认排序规则，可覆盖模型排序配置: Default sort rules, can override model sort config
默认根据列标题自动计算: Default Auto Calculate by Column Title
复制页面的模型可设定为原页面的模型或其子模型。: The model of the copied page can be set to the model of the original page or its sub-model.
默认视图会依据模型信息与视图类型自动生成相应页面，从而简化设计流程。: The default view automatically generates corresponding pages based on the model information and view type, thereby simplifying the design process.
当前用户所在公司的所有部门: All departments of the company the current user belongs to
当前用户所处部门: The department the current user belongs to
当前用户所处部门及下级部门: The department the current user belongs to and its subordinate departments
当前用户所属部门中的员工: Employees in the department to which the current user belongs
当前用户所属部门及下属部门中的员工: Employees in the current user's department and its subordinate departments
当前用户所绑定员工: Employees bound to the current user
当前用户所绑定角色: Roles bound to the current user
确定删除折叠面板和其中的折叠面板项及组件: Confirm deletion of the collapsible panel and the collapsible panel items and components within it
视图区：拖拽「视图」相关组件在这里配置视图模板: View area: Drag and drop 'view' related components here to configure the view template
元件是根据不同字段业务类型自行设计的属性页面。: Components are property pages designed according to different field business types.
多值字段表示该字段可以存储或传输多个该业务类型的数据；非多值字段只能存储或传输单: A multi-value field indicates that the field can store or transmit multiple data of the business type; a non-multi-value field can only store or transmit data of a single business type.
长度在1-32个字符，大小写字母开头，仅包含数字、字母、下划线: 1-32 characters in length, beginning with a lowercase letter, containing only numbers, letters, and underscores
请输入重新生成默认视图方式: Please enter the method to regenerate the default view
仅支持添加多对一类型的虚拟字段: only supports adding multiple pairs of virtual fields of 1 type
第${i + 1}行未填写右侧字段: The right-hand field on line ${i 1} has not been filled in
第${i + 1}行未填写左侧字段: The left field on line ${i   1} is not filled in
以代码形式定义的ServerAction会在模型的动作中进行展示。: ServerAction defined in code form are displayed in the actions of the model.
当前页面所绑定模型中所包含的相关组件，当选中“表格组件”时会自动切换为表格所关联: The related components contained in the model bound to the current page are automatically switched to the model associated with the table when Table Component is selected.
涵盖平台内置的通用组件与用户自定义组件。: Covers common and user-defined components built into the platform.
无法识别的组件类型，请联系开发人员提供技术支持: Unrecognized component type, please contact the developer for technical support
历史版本仅保存正式发布过的页面版本。: The historical version only saves the officially published page version.
创建页面-从Excel导入创建: Create Page - Create from Excel Import
日期时间 - DateTime: Date and Time - Date and Time
分组名称长度不能少于2个字符不能超过15个字符: The group name must be at least 2 characters and no more than 15 characters long
只允许数字、中文和英文字符, 且只能由中文或英文字符开头: Only numbers, Chinese characters, and English letters are allowed, and it must start with a Chinese or English character
该动作在该视图无对应组件: There is no corresponding component for this action in this view
该字段在该视图无对应组件: There is no corresponding component for this field in this view
该布局在该视图无对应组件: There is no corresponding component for this layout in this view
模型不匹配，不允许拖拽进此区域: Model does not match, dragging into this area is not allowed
可拖入其他字段组件或表格列组件: Can be dragged into other field components or table column components
可拖入字段组件或容器组件: Can be dragged into field components or container components
确定删除列分组和其中的组件: Determine the drop column grouping and the components within it
确定删除多级表头和其中的组件: Confirm deletion of the multi-level header and its components
确定删除折叠面板项和其中的组件: Confirm deletion of the collapsible panel item and its components
需在「业务审计」中为页面模型定义审计规则后该动作方可生效。: This action will only take effect after audit rules are defined for the page model in 'Business Audit'.
无法识别的提示类型，请联系开发人员提供技术支持: Unrecognized prompt type, please contact the developer for technical support
存在引用关系的视图、存在引用关系的菜单: Views with Reference Relationships, Menus with Reference Relationships
涵盖平台内置的通用组件与用户自定义组件: Covers Platform-built-in General Components and User-defined Components
当前页面所绑定模型中所包含的相关组件，当选中 “表格组件” 时会自动切换为表格所: Relevant components contained in the model bound to the current page. When "Table Component" is selected, it will automatically switch to the model associated with the table
配置字段类组件时，若模型中已经存在，绑定原字段并展示组件为当前组件。如果不存在则: When configuring field-type components, if the field already exists in the model, bind the original field and display the component as the current component. If it does not exist, add a new field to the model and bind it to the current component
历史版本仅保存正式发布过的页面版本: Historical versions only save officially published page versions
超出此参考线的内容无法打印: Content beyond this reference line cannot be printed
只允许数字、中文和英文字符，且只能由中文或英文字符开头: Only numbers, Chinese and English characters are allowed, and must start with Chinese or English characters
当前页面所绑定模型中所包含的相关组件，当选中 “表格组件” 时会自动切换为表格所: Relevant components contained in the model bound to the current page. When "Table Component" is selected, it will automatically switch to the model associated with the table.
以代码形式定义的 ServerAction 会在模型的动作中进行展示。: ServerAction defined in code form will be displayed in the model's actions.
设置的字段可以在当前视图中被使用 (如表达式): The set fields can be used in the current view (e.g. expressions)
当指定加载函数时，将不再自动识别加载函数: When a load function is specified, the system will no longer automatically recognize the load function
使用名称或显示名称搜索: Search using name or display name
